parsed.production_notes: The video features a human-recorded presenter in a consistent inset panel, while the background visuals are a mix of stock footage, AI-generated imagery (robots), and app UI screencasts.

characters.appearance: A South Asian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and a medium-dark complexion. He has short black hair, a full beard and mustache, and wears black-rimmed glasses.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, knowledgeable, and encouraging, often using hand gestures to emphasize his points while speaking directly to the camera.

scenes.camera: Inset talking-head over a medium shot.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot of a South Asian man standing in a brightly lit classroom in front of a whiteboard with English grammar notes written on it. He is wearing a blue collared shirt and gesturing with both hands as if he is teaching a class. In the foreground, the back of a female student's head is visible as she writes in a notebook.

A close-up, talking-head shot of Character A in the bottom left corner. He is in a dimly lit room with a blueish light source illuminating him from the front. He looks directly at the camera and speaks with a serious expression.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical video with an inset layout. The main background image is of a teacher in a classroom. In the bottom left corner, a smaller video panel shows Character A speaking to the camera. A large purple text box with white text is overlaid in the center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: I have taught English for 9 years. So here, how to achieve fluency in 2 weeks.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I've taught English for 9 years...
So a quick tip to achieve
English fluency in 2 weeks

scenes.setting: A photo collage, followed by an office.
scenes.camera: Inset talking-head over a photo collage and a medium close-up.

panels.panel_visual_description: The background image changes during the scene. It begins with a collage of five photos of famous Indian celebrities: Virat Kohli, Shah Rukh Khan, MS Dhoni, and Deepika Padukone. It then cuts to a medium close-up of a different South Asian man in a business suit and tie, sitting in an office. He has a shocked and worried expression, with wide eyes and a slightly open mouth. A cartoon thought bubble is drawn above his head.

A consistent close-up, talking-head shot of Character A in the bottom left corner. He is in a dimly lit room with a blueish light source. He looks directly at the camera and speaks, his expression shifting to be more emphatic.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical video with an inset layout. Character A remains in the bottom-left inset. The background first shows a collage of celebrities, then cuts to a worried-looking man in an office with a thought bubble. Text overlays appear sequentially over the background images.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: No smart people ever joined English classes. They learned by practicing.

Character A says: If you're afraid to speak in English, your confidence is very low.
scenes.on_screen_text:
No smart person ever
joined English classes.
They learned by practicing
if you're afraid to
speak in English
your confidence is very low

scenes.setting: Futuristic/abstract setting, then an app store interface.
scenes.camera: Inset talking-head over various shots and an app screencast.

panels.panel_visual_description: The background image changes. It starts with a close-up of a metallic, female-presenting android with glowing blue lines on its body. It then cuts to a young South Asian man sitting at a desk in a warmly lit room, reading a book with a glowing lightbulb graphic above his head. Finally, it cuts to a screen recording of a mobile phone's app store page in dark mode, showing the app's logo, name, ratings, and screenshots.

A consistent close-up, talking-head shot of Character A in the bottom left corner. He is in a dimly lit room with a blueish light source. He looks directly at the camera and speaks, using hand gestures for emphasis.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical video with an inset layout. Character A remains in the bottom-left inset. The background shows a sequence of images: a robot, a man studying, and finally the app's page on the Google Play Store. Text overlays appear sequentially.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: But just 7 days of practice with an AI assistance, you can activate your brain.

Character A says: So, use MySivi AI application every day to improve your English.
scenes.on_screen_text:
But just 7 days of practice
with the AI assistance
you can activate your brain
So use
MySivi AI application
every day to
improve your English

scenes.scene_label: How It Works: Practice with People

panels.panel_visual_description: The background shows a sequence of shots. First, a split-screen with a South Asian man on a couch using his phone on top, and a close-up of a phone displaying a black android on the bottom. Next, a young South Asian man in a blue shirt looks at his reflection in a mirror. Finally, a split-screen shows a young South Asian woman in a pink top looking at her phone on top, and a young South Asian man in a black jacket on a patio speaking into his phone on the bottom.

A consistent close-up, talking-head shot of Character A in the bottom left corner. He is in a dimly lit room with a blueish light source. He looks directly at the camera and speaks, gesturing with his hands.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical video with an inset layout. Character A remains in the bottom-left inset. The background shows various people using phones or looking in mirrors, illustrating the problem of practicing alone and the solution of talking to others. Text overlays appear sequentially.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: This AI makes you learn English without any difficulties. Confidence won't come if you're stuck practicing it alone. You need to speak with people.

Character A says: This MySivi app lets you talk with strangers worldwide. Speak daily, your fear will disappear.
scenes.on_screen_text:
This AI makes you
learn english
without any difficulties
Confidence won't come
stuck practicing it alone.
You need to speak
with people.
This MySivi app
lets you talk with
strangers worldwide.
Speak daily
your fear will disappear.

scenes.camera: Inset talking-head over an app screencast.

panels.panel_visual_description: The background shows a series of screen recordings of a mobile app's user interface. The screens, which have a clean, light-purple and white design, show a dashboard with a robot avatar and progress meters, a learning path with different modules, a chat interface with an AI tutor providing grammar correction, and a lesson map against a sky background.

A consistent close-up, talking-head shot of Character A in the bottom left corner. He is in a dimly lit room with a blueish light source. He looks directly at the camera and speaks, gesturing with his hands.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical video with an inset layout. Character A remains in the bottom-left inset. The background shows various screens from the MySivi app, highlighting its features like lessons, quizzes, and exercises. Text overlays appear sequentially.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: This application has everything: lessons, quizzes, and practical exercises. Practice smartly with MySivi and unlock your confidence in just 2 weeks.
scenes.on_screen_text:
This application
has everything
lessons, quizzes
& practical exercises
Practice smartly with
MySivi
unlock your confidence
in just 2 weeks.

scenes.camera: Inset talking-head over an app screencast.

panels.panel_visual_description: A screen recording of a mobile phone's app store page in dark mode. The page is for the 'MySivi - English Speaking App', showing its purple and white logo, name, ratings, download size, and screenshots of the user interface.

A consistent close-up, talking-head shot of Character A in the bottom left corner. He is in a dimly lit room with a blueish light source. He looks directly at the camera and speaks, nodding for emphasis.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical video with an inset layout. Character A remains in the bottom-left inset. The background shows the app's page on the Google Play Store. Text overlays appear as a final call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Install MySivi app and start improving your fluency.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Install MySivi App
and start improving
your fluency
